programmes.show_description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
4/52. 'S fìor thoil le Granaidh Clangair a bhith a' fighe 's a bhith feumail. Granaidh Clanger loves to knit and to be useful.
13/15. Eilidh visits Emily and her adorable rabbits, Syrius and Seumas, as we get to find out how to look after rabbits.
17/21. Marvin, Oona, and Silky play hide-and-seek. Silky wants to find the best hiding place, but she has some trouble finding the right spot to hide.
18/21. It's a hot day on Puffin Rock, and Oona, May and Marvin want to swim in the pond but find the water has dried up. They decide to follow a frog, but where is he going?
5/26. Petit and his friends want to ride the 'space' rollercoaster at the theme park, but they are not tall enough.
8/26. Brush invites Hare, Fox, Owl and Tusk for a fancy game of croquet. Jack shows up uninvited and wants to play, too.
80/82. John Carmichael reads Sylvia agus Isean, written and illustrated by Catherine Rayner and translated into Gaelic by Jo MacDonald.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 38/52. Tha Stella sìceach an-diugh. Stella is psychic today.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 39/52. Tha Stella a' cur àm teaghlaich seachad le Molaidh aig a' phàirc-spèilidh. Stella spends some family time with Molly at the skate park.
1/9. Tha bacadh-cainnt air Kana ris an canar stad-cainnt 's tha i ag innse dhuinn mu dhèidhinn. Kana has a speech impediment which is called a stutter, and she tells us all about it.
9/13. Tha Flix 'son bhith na shàr chat feireil - dìreach mar athair, Zeno. Flix wants to be the ultimate outdoor cat - just like his father, Zeno.
9/20. Bitzer, Shaun and Flock are convinced that a monster is at loose on the farm and hide in the barn. But what exactly is it they are afraid of?
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
2/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.
9/12. Tha treat sònraichte aig Abigail airson brunch, Lof Banana. Abigail has a special brunch treat, a banana loaf.
2/8. Ramsay escapes Glasgow for an action-packed weekend in Speyside. Ramsay a'teiche a Glaschu airson dà latha luma làn ann an Srath Spè.
5/5. Tha Màiri a' feuchainn ri dath a thoirt às a fhraoich, agus a' togail a bhuntata. Mairi tries out natural dyeing and harvests her tatties.
The story of Julie Fleeting, one of the pioneering football players in the women's game.
1/4. How ecological corridors have helped the desert lion prosper in the Kunene Region of north western Namibia.
2/2. Singer Ruairidh Gray visits the Grand Ole Opry and brings us musical highlights from legendary music series Tuath Cheòl.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.

...Bhriogais Chearr/The Wrong Trousers. Tha briogais-teicneo 's loidsear ùr gus trioblaid uabhasach adhbharachadh do Wallace 's Gromit. A pair of techno-trousers and a new lodger cause untold trouble.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
1/10. Skipinnish le Land Below the Waves aig cuirm-chiùil bho Chaisteal Dhùn Èideann. Skipinnish perform Land Below the Waves at a concert from Edinburgh Castle.
...Qualifier - Scotland v Luxembourg. Live international football as Scotland women's team take on Luxembourg in a World Cup qualifier.
4/8. Sann air dealachach, trèigsinn agus eilthireach a tha am program a cuir an aghaidh an t-seachdain seo. Alyth MacCormick explores the themes of parting, leaving home and exile.
2/8. Ramsay escapes Glasgow for an action-packed weekend in Speyside. Ramsay a'teiche a Glaschu airson dà latha luma làn ann an Srath Spè.
3/12. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr far a bheil barrachd air eòlas coitcheann a dhìth gus buannachadh. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a new quiz show.
1/6. In Inverness, an old office on the iconic market brae steps gets transformed into a hairdresser's salon.

programmes.show_name: Cuirm aig Celtic Connections | Valtos & Caraidean
programmes.show_description: 1/3. Valtos and friends in concert for Celtic Connections. Presented by Megan MacLellan.
2/4. To preserve Romanian wildlife, a 150km-long passage was created in 2010: the Zarand corridor. For bears, this gateway is key to survival.
15/33. Gaisgich Britpop, Supergrass, air Àrd-Ùrlar Hot House aig Belladrum 2025. Britpop legends Supergrass perform their hits on the Hot House Stage at Belladrum. Contains strong language.
2/2. Catrìona NicNèill aig Farpaisean Chòmhlan Pìoba na Cruinne le còmhlain aig ìre a h-aon. Carrie MacNeil presents Grade 1 performances from the World Pipe Band Championships.
